content.excerpt_text: Security scanner for AI infrastructure. Discover MCP configs (22 clients), scan for CVEs (OSV/NVD/EPSS/KEV), map blast radius to reachable credentials and tools, runtime proxy with 7 detectors, 30 MCP tools, CIS benchmarks (AWS/Azure/GCP/Snowflake), MITRE ATT&CK mapping, and 11-framework compliance.

source_payload.html: Security scanner for AI infrastructure. Discover MCP configs (22 clients), scan for CVEs (OSV/NVD/EPSS/KEV), map blast radius to reachable credentials and tools, runtime proxy with 7 detectors, 30 MCP tools, CIS benchmarks (AWS/Azure/GCP/Snowflake), MITRE ATT&CK mapping, and 11-framework compliance.

content.excerpt_text: Real-time reliability monitoring for LLM agents. v0.11.0: isotonic score calibration (calibrate_isotonic), conformal alert thresholds (conformal_alert_threshold), Kalman chain smoothing (kalman_smooth_risks), ptrue_weight default 0.9 (exp134-137, AUROC ~0.87). v0.10.0: NVIDIA NIM backend, domain-aware thresholds, Karpathy nines dashboard.

source_payload.html: Real-time reliability monitoring for LLM agents. v0.11.0: isotonic score calibration (calibrate_isotonic), conformal alert thresholds (conformal_alert_threshold), Kalman chain smoothing (kalman_smooth_risks), ptrue_weight default 0.9 (exp134-137, AUROC ~0.87). v0.10.0: NVIDIA NIM backend, domain-aware thresholds, Karpathy nines dashboard.
